bird.name: 湍鸭
bird.summary: 湍鸭（学名：Merganetta armata），是雁形目鸭科的一种鸟类。 特征 湍鸭体重约398.82克，翼长约163.4毫米，嘴峰长约33.5毫米，喙宽度约9.8毫米，喙厚度约9.8毫米，跗蹠长约36.2毫米，尾长约111.1毫米。湍鸭在其分布区内为留鸟，其栖息在开放的河流…

relations.subject: 湍鸭
relations.evidence: This is a declining species due to competition for its invertebrate food from introduced trout, pollution, forest destruction, and damming of mountain rivers for hydroelectric schemes
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
